steps.title: Read the shared experience
steps.content: The narrator says the earth seems buried, the balloon seems to wander through space, and the group no longer speaks, thinks, or lives. Those details show total absorption in the altered perspective of the balloon ride.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported emotions
steps.content: Choice A overstates isolation, choice C invents distress, and choice D focuses on the narrator observing companions' enthusiasm. The passage centers on the group's immersive change in perspective while floating above the earth. The answer is B.
